name: 予定名に通番を入れる
block: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="operation" id=")h$snmb3l$T+}ysYIBaF" x="166" y="40"><value name="value"><block type="filter" id="I}MC~05wCnwv%g9I6)d0"><value name="e1"><block type="event" id="?SVtuT2t[XgKPNNfeJKl"><field name="NAME">all</field><value name="calendar"><block type="variables_get_calendar" id="/x2lBRd?vgbQU7QI*g+O"><field name="NAME">木村聡志 (職場)</field><field name="id">c_glrc4mcaai0mcim1kios244628@group.calendar.google.com</field></block></value></block></value><value name="e2"><block type="condition4" id=";iAZf[wz4FU|1A:WH~Q?"><value name="value1"><block type="lastmonth" id="EqzP9FPmjsX_!20R-{{e"><field name="dd">summary</field></block></value><value name="value2"><block type="text" id="Ue9}QiutGz|Kg2ifd:Kp"><field name="TEXT">勉強会</field></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="statement"><block type="replace" id="1I3@}[DQdk~J^Yc510iX"><field name="item">summary</field><field name="text"></field><next><block type="insert2" id="{qo*0?RqJ$78VAbo`ee("></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
ruby_code:
(get_events(('c_glrc4mcaai0mcim1kios244628@group.calendar.google.com')).filter {|e| ((e.summary)=='勉強会')}).each do |e|
  e.summary="第" + n + "回 勉強会"
  insert_event(e,'c_glrc4mcaai0mcim1kios244628@group.calendar.google.com')
end

name: 『買い物』の予定を『私用』に置換して職場に共有
block: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="operation" id="b44sz/(I/;hc78je8799" x="101" y="105"><value name="value"><block type="event" id="YZ?!sma}`t9?Y+M)sLL|"><field name="NAME">all</field><value name="calendar"><block type="variables_get_calendar" id="CoRN?r]yn=U-Pq6dtz#U"><field name="NAME">木村聡志 (プライベート)</field><field name="id">c_njibul8ro8gifj5g44rao28kvc@group.calendar.google.com</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="statement"><block type="statement" id="3pQ8(X7SadiqA3wS_L+M"><value name="condition"><block type="condition4" id=".X+U)I`GNrJ#T+$^hBX+"><value name="value1"><block type="lastmonth" id="j(Q7*zBF=d:umC(-`gH%"><field name="dd">summary</field></block></value><value name="value2"><block type="text" id="XA*#8+zv2fc1+w.H$,m#"><field name="TEXT">買い物</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="statement"><block type="replace" id="49CJ4Dtcmg7`Q74_+l%Y"><field name="item">summary</field><field name="text">私用</field></block></statement><next><block type="insert2" id="i9cq:s`oEnU3|_zz*sZC"><value name="calendar"><block type="variables_get_calendar" id=".%JNDZuXbWa|`l1V5bu+"><field name="NAME">木村聡志 (職場)</field><field name="id">c_glrc4mcaai0mcim1kios244628@group.calendar.google.com</field></block></value></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
ruby_code:
get_events(('c_njibul8ro8gifj5g44rao28kvc@group.calendar.google.com')).each do |e|
  if ((e.summary)=='買い物')
    e.summary="私用"
  end
  insert_event(e,('c_glrc4mcaai0mcim1kios244628@group.calendar.google.com'))
end

name: 研究室関連の予定は詳細を隠して友人に共有
block: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="operation" id="D:]m20_2O^N[30qp36:D" x="148" y="50"><value name="value"><block type="event" id="~Ts4NrYV3~*iiO-Z,/%`"><field name="NAME">all</field><value name="calendar"><block type="variables_get_calendar" id="{APpnDQu?ACxuo6fFl-n"><field name="NAME">プライベート</field><field name="id">c_njibul8ro8gifj5g44rao28kvc@group.calendar.google.com</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="statement"><block type="statement" id="H*Pg|^:Z_NhjPU9y0`Q0"><value name="condition"><block type="or" id="I1o;lzWojpsjF{/J!,4!"><value name="bool1"><block type="condition" id="bkjyg]$@x]_wcG{Yh3%?"><field name="item">summary</field><field name="text">勉強会</field><field name="dd">true</field></block></value><value name="bool2"><block type="condition" id=";aiy^,4,~Z*0{3[PJe_4"><field name="item">summary</field><field name="text">打合せ</field><field name="dd">true</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="statement"><block type="replace" id="k;cqREe:}Z]h..h^vhoW"><field name="item">summary</field><field name="text">研究室</field></block></statement><next><block type="insert2" id="P=oLdT}t_#6KmHHAtHlu"><value name="calendar"><block type="variables_get_calendar" id="s%.EMZ3G-%9v%ESsTIdy"><field name="NAME">共有カレンダ</field><field name="id">c_glrc4mcaai0mcim1kios244628@group.calendar.google.com</field></block></value></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
ruby_code:
get_events(('c_njibul8ro8gifj5g44rao28kvc@group.calendar.google.com')).each do |e|
  if ((e.summary.match(/勉強会/))||(e.summary.match(/打合せ/)))
    e.summary="研究室"
  end
  insert_event(e,('c_glrc4mcaai0mcim1kios244628@group.calendar.google.com'))
end

name: 7月のアルバイトの合計時間を集計
block: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="display" id="!xF5fI/tvYAXV6g3601R" x="26" y="38"><value name="NAME"><block type="sum" id="KJ5hNWjoq*7{rffO=c5F"><value name="calendar"><block type="filter" id="kpY5KKP:iJV@/OJK5r:W"><value name="e1"><block type="event" id="oasb*x,BmacFAr@A=!;d"><value name="calendar"><block type="variables_get_calendar" id="qvH3b{1?vA{em|y;RG3d"><field name="NAME">プライベート</field><field name="id">c_njibul8ro8gifj5g44rao28kvc@group.calendar.google.com</field></block></value></block></value><value name="e2"><block type="and" id="INJ%9n7)$H`e(Ko)]*Ly"><value name="bool1"><block type="condition" id="[0-#yXb6W6|g8S`9a8i+"><field name="item">summary</field><field name="text">アルバイト</field><field name="dd">true</field></block></value><value name="bool2"><block type="year" id="/dLFv.bY0~Ew4y9ane@%"><field name="year">2023</field><value name="month"><block type="month" id="wT2qOq3TJtGG)][3CFv,"><field name="month">7</field></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></xml>
ruby_code: puts ((get_events(('c_njibul8ro8gifj5g44rao28kvc@group.calendar.google.com')).filter {|e| ((e.summary.match(/アルバイト/))&&(2023-7))}).map{|e| (new Date(e.end.date_time) - new Date(e.start.date_time)).to_i}.sum)
